description:
We are seeking a Software Developer to support our digital engineering and digital twin initiatives, with a focus on system integration among
Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC), Autodesk Tandem, IoT/Sensor platforms, and Esri ArcGIS solutions
.
This role involves developing
ETL tools, API services, and GIS-based applications
to support digital twin, asset/facility management, and smart infrastructure projects in the construction and utilities sectors.
Key Responsibilities
1. System Integration & API Development
Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and middleware services integrating:
Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) & Autodesk Tandem
IoT and sensor platforms (BMS, SCADA, environmental sensors, etc.)
ArcGIS (Online / Enterprise / Dashboards / GeoEvent)
Implement secure authentication (OAuth, token-based) and API workflows
2. ETL & Data Engineering
Develop ETL pipelines to extract, transform, and load data from:
ACC (Docs, Assets, Forms, Issues)
Tandem asset and sensor data
BIM models (Revit/IFC metadata)
GIS feature services and geodatabases
Perform data mapping between BIM, GIS, and digital twin schemas
Automate data synchronization across systems
3. IoT & Sensor Integration
Develop connectors to ingest real-time and batch sensor data
Support protocols such as REST, MQTT, CSV/JSON feeds
Implement time-series data processing and integration into GIS/Tandem
4. GIS & Application Development
Develop web GIS applications using ArcGIS SDKs
Configure dashboards and visualization tools integrating BIM + IoT data
Extend ArcGIS Solutions with custom widgets and automation tools
5. Deployment & Support
Deploy applications and services on cloud or enterprise environments
Implement logging, monitoring, and error handling
Prepare technical documentation and support PoC/client implementations
Requirements
Required Qualifications
Bachelor’s Degree in:
Computer Science / Software Engineering
Geoinformatics / GIS
Information Technology
Engineering (Civil / Infrastructure / Mechatronics) with programming experience
Strong foundation in
software development, APIs and system integration
Understanding of
data structures, APIs, and database concepts
Ability to work in a
multi-technology environment (GIS + BIM + IoT)
Good problem-solving skills and ability to work in a team
Interested in AI, GIS, BIM, IoT, or Digital Twin technologies
Technical Skills
Programming:
Python, JavaScript / TypeScript
Backend/API:
RESTful APIs (FastAPI, Flask, Node.js)
Database:
SQL (PostgreSQL/PostGIS, SQL Server, Azure SQL, MySQL)
Data Formats:
JSON, GeoJSON, CSV
GIS:
ArcGIS platform (ArcGIS Online / Enterprise / ArcGIS Pro) - Optional
Version Control:
Git
Preferred / Advantage
Experience with Autodesk APIs (ACC / Tandem / Forge)
Experience with IoT integration (MQTT, SCADA, sensor APIs)
Knowledge of BIM (Revit, IFC) and GeoBIM workflows
Experience with Docker/cloud platforms (Azure / AWS)
Exposure to spatial or time-series data
Why Join Us
Work on cutting-edge
GeoBIM, Digital Twin, and Smart Infrastructure projects
Exposure to leading platforms:
Esri ArcGIS, Autodesk Construction Cloud, Autodesk Tandem
Opportunity to shape Malaysia’s digital transformation in construction and utilities
Collaborative and innovation-driven environment
Nice to Have (Optional to include)
Experience in construction, infrastructure, or utilities industry
Knowledge of real-time dashboards and analytics
Interest in AI, or smart building/city solutions
